whatWasRepaired:

description:

- Remote Start, Keyless Entry & Push Button Start
- Brembo Front Brake Calipers
- Panoramic Sunroof
- Heated Steering Wheel
- Heated & Vented Front Seats
- Park Assist

.
.
𝐂𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐟𝐟👀:
- Glovebox is Electronically Controlled
- Hidden Center Console Compartment
- Rear Seats Fold Flat Down
- LED Headlamps (actually bright)
- Seat vibrates with proximity system
- Sound systems loud loud
whySalvage: Side swipe accident to the driver side of the vehicle, mainly impacting the rear quarter panel /  fender area
